Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Kommándoblohkat eai leat dohkkehuvvon dán serveris

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Fuomáš! Go čálát vuollái girji, de it sáhte šat lasihit maidege.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks

translation: Áiggut go rahpat liŋkka dahje máŋget čuohpusbeavdái?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Ale goassege raba linkkaid olbmuin geaid it luohte!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
translation: Boastu IP adreassa dahje amas spealli

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!

translation: %1$s vázzii káktusa njeaiga go geahččalii viehkat eret %2$s

translation: %1$s njuvdui eatnamii go blohkka gahčai ala

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
translation: Leat go sihkar ahte áiggut guođđit?

source_string: This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Demo bistá vihtta speallabeaivvi, olu lihkku!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Dál leat badjel viđát beaivvi, geavat %s vurket šearbmagová du huksemušaidguin.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Dát demo bistá 5 spillabeiviid (birrasii diimmu ja 40 minuvta). Iskka ovdánemiid hintaid ovddas! Olu lihkku!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Demo áigi lea nohkan, oaste spealu jus áiggut joatkit, dahje álggat ođđá máilmmi!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Áiggotgo sihkkarit lohkadit dán máilmmi váttisvuođa dási? Máilmmi váttisvuohta lea %1$s dás ovddosguvlui, iige dan sáhte šat rievdadit goassege.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Ii doaibman (Geahččal ođđasit álggáhit spilla ja launchera)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Duođaštanbálvalusat eai leat jur dál olámuttos. Geahččal áinnas ođđasit.
